attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
*
FROM
(
SELECT 
GCRH.AAR_NUMBER BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,
CAST(SCRL.CREATED_ON AS DATE) DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DT,
COALESCE(NRR.ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999) ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
CAST(SCRL.QUANTITY AS INTEGER) RMA_REQUEST_LINE_RETURN_QTY,
COALESCE(SCRL.ORIG_ERP_LINE_ID, -999) LINE_ID, /* MODIFIED AS PART OF Q3FY15 */
SCRL.CREATED_ON CREATED_ON
FROM (SELECT  * FROM $$STGDB.ST_DMP_CO_RETURN_LINE SCRL  WHERE COALESCE(QUANTITY,0)<>0 ) SCRL
INNER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_DMP_CO_RETURN_HEADER GCRH
ON GCRH.RETURN_ID=SCRL.RETURN_ID
AND GCRH.RETURN_STATUS <> 1
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_RMA_REQUEST NRR
ON (GCRH.AAR_NUMBER=NRR.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM)

UNION ALL

SELECT 
GCRH.AAR_NUMBER BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,
CAST(ECRL.CREATED_ON AS DATE) DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DT,
COALESCE(NRR.ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999) ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
CAST(ECRL.QUANTITY AS INTEGER) RMA_REQUEST_LINE_RETURN_QTY,
COALESCE(ECRL.ORIG_ERP_LINE_ID, -999) LINE_ID,   /* MODIFIED AS PART OF Q3FY15 */
ECRL.CREATED_ON CREATED_ON
FROM (SELECT *   FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DMP_CO_RETURN_LINE ECRL  WHERE COALESCE(QUANTITY,0)<>0 ) ECRL
INNER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_DMP_CO_RETURN_HEADER GCRH
ON GCRH.RETURN_ID=ECRL.RETURN_ID
AND GCRH.RETURN_STATUS <> 1
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_RMA_REQUEST NRR
ON (GCRH.AAR_NUMBER=NRR.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM)

)RMALINE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( PARTITION BY RMALINE.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,RMALINE.LINE_ID,RMALINE.RMA_REQUEST_LINE_RETURN_QTY ORDER BY RMALINE.CREATED_ON,RMALINE.LINE_ID DESC)= 1
attributes.Pre SQL:
DELETE FROM $$STGDB.WI_RMA_REQUEST_LINE_DMP ALL ;


DELETE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DMP_CO_RETURN_LINE ECRL 
WHERE EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_DMP_CO_RETURN_LINE SCRL
WHERE SCRL.RETURN_ID=ECRL.RETURN_ID 
)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 SCRL.BATCH_ID,
 SCRL.RETURN_LINE_ID,
 SCRL.RETURN_ID,
 SCRL.PARENT_RETURN_LINE_ID,
 SCRL.PART_NUMBER,
 SCRL.DESCRIPTION,
 SCRL.LINE_NUMBER,
 SCRL.UNIT_NET_PRICE,
 SCRL.QUANTITY,
 SCRL.EXT_NET_PRICE,
 SCRL.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 SCRL.ORIG_ERP_LINE_ID,
 SCRL.REQUESTED_SHIP_DATE,
 SCRL.ACTUAL_SHIP_DATE,
 SCRL.CREATED_ON,
 SCRL.CREATED_BY,
 SCRL.UPDATED_ON,
 SCRL.UPDATED_BY,
 SCRL.STATUS,
 SCRL.ACTIVE,
 SCRL.HAS_CHILDREN,
 SCRL.GRAND_PARENT_RETURN_LINE_ID,
 SCRL.TERRITORY_ID,
 SCRL.SHARE_NODE_ID,
 SCRL.ITEM_TYPE,
 SCRL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
 SCRL.CREATE_DATETIME,
 SCRL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 SCRL.REFRESH_DATETIME,
 SCRL.ACTION_CODE,
 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
 $$STGDB. ST_DMP_CO_RETURN_LINE SCRL
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL,
$$SERVICEVWDB.N_RMA_REQUEST NRR,
$$GGSRCVWDB.GG_DMP_CO_RETURN_HEADER GCRH
WHERE GCRH.RETURN_ID = SCRL.RETURN_ID
AND GCRH.AAR_NUMBER=NRR.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM
AND GCRH.RETURN_STATUS <>1
AND SCRL.ORIG_ERP_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NRR.ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY
)
AND SCRL.ORIG_ERP_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL

SELECT
 WIRRL.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,
WIRRL.DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DATE DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DT,
COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999) ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WIRRL.RMA_REQUEST_LINE_RETURN_QTY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RMA_REQUEST_LINE_DMP WIRRL
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_RMA_REQUEST NRR
ON (WIRRL.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM = NRR.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM)
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO /* Modified as part of Q3FY15 */
ON (NRR.ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
ON ( WIRRL.ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 AND WIRRL.LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
 AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSO.SS_CODE
)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY WIRRL.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,WIRRL.LINE_ID ORDER BY WIRRL.DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DATE DESC)=1
